productDisplayName: Flying Machine Men Skinny Blue Jeans
description: Style NoteLook cool and casual in these heavily distressed washed blue jeans from flying machine. The washed and frayed look gives you an individual style, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team it with tees and canvas shoes.Product DetailsBlue jeans with a washed look, has two insert pockets on the front with brand logo embroidered above the left pocket and brand name appliqued on the right side pocket, two patch pockets on the back with embroidered detailing, brand name appliqued on the waist at the back, belt loops on waistband and a metal zipper and button closure on the frontMaterial and Care73% cotton, 26% polyester and 1% spandexDelicate machine wash coldDo not bleach or tumble dryHang dry in shadeWarm iron on reverseDo not iron on print or embroiderySize and FitSkinnyThe model (height 6') is wearing a size 32
